summary: Tested CourtVision AI (FastAPI + React + MongoDB) end-to-end. Backend: 29/29 pytest cases pass covering auth (admin/pro/free login, register, /me, lockout-friendly), core (leagues, teams, games/today, predictions with confidence>=75 threshold, anon-locked confidence>=88, deterministic prediction returns, performance summary/by-league/timeline), admin (dashboard, users, role updates, demo-mode api-keys, 403 for non-admin), and payments (packages, Stripe checkout session creation with pending payment_transaction record, 401 for unauth). Frontend: all 11 review flows verified — Landing CTAs (signup/dashboard/premium) present, public Dashboard renders with upgrade CTA, Match Center league chips work and filter, Match Detail renders predicted final (87.4 vs 78.7), confidence badge (80), Model Breakdown (ELO/Rating/Form/H2H), Adjustments (rest/injury/travel deltas), team strengths. Performance page shows 65.5% accuracy / +25% ROI, cumulative profit line chart, accuracy-by-league bar chart, and daily breakdown table. Pricing has all 4 subscribe buttons; anon click correctly redirects to /login. Admin login works, /admin shows users table, revenue, demo-mode banner, 4 grant-premium buttons. Non-admin user redirected from /admin to /dashboard. Profile has team favorite toggles.

issues: Recharts container reports width(-1)/height(-1) warnings when navigating before container has layout (cosmetic, charts render correctly on the actual Performance page at 1920px)

action_items: (optional) AuthContext bootstraps by calling /api/auth/me which logs a 401 in the console for every anon page load — functional, but consider suppressing via try/catch silent or a /me endpoint that returns 200/null for anon to reduce console noise.
(optional) Provide additional data-testid hooks on Performance page summary cards (accuracy/roi/wins) and Dashboard 'Live Now' section so future tests can assert directly without text matching.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py + routes_auth.py — bcrypt hashes generated correctly ($2b$), httpOnly + secure + samesite=none cookies set on login/register/refresh, brute-force lockout implemented (5 attempts / 15-min). Good.
seed_runtime.seed_users() is idempotent and updates password_hash + role if admin password is rotated. Good.

routes_core.py — predictions are deterministic (driven by hash(game_id) in seed + pure prediction_engine.predict). Verified by /api/predictions/{id} twice returning identical confidence and predicted_winner_id.

routes_payments.py — never trusts frontend prices, fixed PACKAGES dict, creates payment_transactions doc with payment_status='pending' and metadata. Stripe webhook + status both idempotent on payment_status=paid.

Mongo _id leakage — server consistently uses projection {_id: 0} on reads and converts to public dicts in auth/admin paths. No raw ObjectId in responses (verified for /api/teams and /api/admin/users).
CORS uses explicit FRONTEND_URL (not '*') when allow_credentials=True. Correct.
Minor: ACCESS_TTL_MIN constant is named '_MIN' but is actually 1440 minutes (24h). Naming is fine but worth a comment.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@courtvisionai.com / ChangeOnFirstLogin123 | Premium: pro@courtvisionai.com / Pro123! | Free: user@courtvisionai.com / User123!  (seeded at startup, idempotent). Backed up in this report since /app/memory/test_credentials.md was empty.
seed_data_creation: Seed runs on FastAPI lifespan startup — 16 leagues, ~85 teams, ~120 games (mix of live/scheduled/finished over 21-day history), 1 prediction per game, 3 default user accounts (admin/premium/free). One TEST_ prefixed registered user created during testing remains in DB (harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All review_request items pass. Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_courtvision.py — run via: `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_courtvision.py -v`. Stripe checkout endpoint creates a real session against sk_test_emergent and returns a Stripe-hosted URL; we DO NOT complete payment, only verify URL + pending txn (do not click through Stripe checkout in any future automation). Predictions are deterministic by game_id — do not introduce randomness. Demo-mode banner on /admin is intentional because API_SPORTS_KEY is empty.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Single initial test failure (assertion comparing original-case email vs lowercased response) was a test bug (backend correctly lowercases email per /api/auth/register contract); test fixed.
